chapter_title.ar: بَابُ حَقِّ الْمُؤْمِنِ عَلَى أَخِيهِ وَ أَدَاءِ حَقِّهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 75 – The rights of the Momin upon his brother and the fulfilling of his rights

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (50/ 9)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (50/ 9)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) حَقٌّ عَلَى الْمُسْلِمِ إِذَا أَرَادَ سَفَراً أَنْ يُعْلِمَ إِخْوَانَهُ وَ حَقٌّ عَلَى إِخْوَانِهِ إِذَا قَدِمَ أَنْ يَأْتُوهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘A right upon the Muslim is that whenever he intends to travel, he should let his brethren know, and it is a right upon his Muslim brother to visit him when he returns from the journey’.
en.sarwar: 16. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from al-Nawfali from al-Sakuni from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “The Messenger of Allah has said, ‘It is a right upon a Muslim to inform his brothers (in belief) of his decision to go on a journey. It is a right upon his Muslim brothers to visit him when he returns from the journey.’”
